# nest-temporal

> NestJS integration for Temporal.io — decorator-based activity registration, automatic worker discovery, and a clean client API. Inspired by @nestjs/bullmq.

## What it does

nest-temporal wraps the Temporal.io TypeScript SDK into an idiomatic NestJS module with:
- `TemporalModule.forRoot()` / `forRootAsync()` — centralized configuration
- `@Worker()` class decorator — marks a provider as a Temporal activity host (like `@Processor` in BullMQ)
- `@Activity()` method decorator — registers methods as Temporal activities (like `@Process` in BullMQ)
- `TemporalClientService` — global injectable for starting/querying/signaling workflows
- `@InjectWorkflowClient(taskQueue)` — task-queue-scoped client injection (like `@InjectQueue` in BullMQ)
- `WorkflowClient` — pre-bound client class returned by `@InjectWorkflowClient()`
- Auto-discovery at startup — scans all NestJS providers, binds activities with DI context preserved

## Install

```bash
npm install nest-temporal @temporalio/client @temporalio/worker
```

Peer deps: @nestjs/common ^10||^11, @nestjs/core ^10||^11, @temporalio/client ^1.9+, @temporalio/worker ^1.9+ (optional)

## Public API (all from 'nest-temporal')

### Module
- `TemporalModule.forRoot(options?: TemporalModuleOptions): DynamicModule`
- `TemporalModule.forRootAsync(options: TemporalModuleAsyncOptions): DynamicModule`
- `TemporalModule.registerClient(taskQueue: string | { taskQueue: string }): DynamicModule`

### Decorators
- `@Worker(options: TemporalWorkerOptions)` — class decorator
- `@Activity(options?: ActivityOptions)` — method decorator
- `@InjectWorkflowClient(taskQueue: string)` — parameter/property decorator

### Services
- `TemporalClientService` — global client (inject directly)
- `WorkflowClient` — task-queue-scoped client (inject via @InjectWorkflowClient)

### Helpers
- `getWorkflowClientToken(taskQueue: string): string` — returns DI token for testing/manual providers

### Interfaces
- `TemporalModuleOptions` — { address?, namespace?, enableWorker?, tls?, workerDefaults? }
- `TemporalModuleAsyncOptions` — { imports?, useFactory, inject? }
- `TemporalWorkerOptions` — { taskQueue, workflowsPath, maxCachedWorkflows?, ... }
- `ActivityOptions` — { name? }
- `WorkflowStartOptions` — { workflowId, args? }

## Two ways to start workflows

### Approach A: Global TemporalClientService
```typescript
constructor(private readonly temporal: TemporalClientService) {}
await this.temporal.startWorkflow('OrderWorkflow', `order-${id}`, [args], 'my-queue');
```

### Approach B: Scoped @InjectWorkflowClient (BullMQ-style)
```typescript
// Module: TemporalModule.registerClient('my-queue')
constructor(@InjectWorkflowClient('my-queue') private readonly client: WorkflowClient) {}
await this.client.start('OrderWorkflow', { workflowId: `order-${id}`, args: [args] });
```

## Defining activities

```typescript
@Worker({ taskQueue: 'orders', workflowsPath: require.resolve('./order.workflow') })
@Injectable()
export class OrderActivities {
  constructor(private readonly payments: PaymentService) {} // DI works

  @Activity()
  async chargePayment(orderId: string, amount: number) {
    return this.payments.charge(orderId, amount);
  }

  @Activity({ name: 'refund' })
  async handleRefund(orderId: string) { ... }
}
```

## Workflows (standard Temporal, no decorators)

```typescript
import { proxyActivities } from '@temporalio/workflow';
const { chargePayment } = proxyActivities({ startToCloseTimeout: '30s' });
export async function OrderWorkflow(orderId: string, amount: number) {
  await chargePayment(orderId, amount);
}
```

## BullMQ mapping

| @nestjs/bullmq | nest-temporal |
|---|---|
| BullModule.forRoot() | TemporalModule.forRoot() |
| BullModule.registerQueue({ name }) | TemporalModule.registerClient(taskQueue) |
| @InjectQueue('name') | @InjectWorkflowClient('taskQueue') |
| queue.add('job', data) | client.start('Workflow', { workflowId, args }) |
| @Processor('queue') | @Worker({ taskQueue }) |
| @Process('job') | @Activity() |

## Detailed docs

- [Full README](https://github.com/your-org/nest-temporal/blob/main/README.md)
- [Full API reference for LLMs](https://github.com/your-org/nest-temporal/blob/main/llms-full.txt)
